title: Unexpected OP_NAND
body:
Is there a problem with this?

    module cpu (input wire x, input wire y, output reg z);
       always @*
         z <= x ~& y;
    endmodule

I get this error message:

    -- Running command `read_verilog verilog/cpu.v; synth_ice40 -blif nybble.blif'
    1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
    Parsing Verilog input from `verilog/cpu.v' to AST representation.
    ERROR: Parser error in line verilog/cpu.v:3: syntax error, unexpected OP_NAND
